title: SECOND_WITNESS_RECEIPT_V1
description: Receipt schema for second-witness attestation required by TEMPLE_SANDBOX_POLICY_V1. Without a valid receipt of this type, no transcendence-sensitive Temple artifact may exit the Sandbox.

receipt_id.description: Unique identifier for this attestation event

artifact_id.description: Local handle identifying the artifact being witnessed; must resolve within the claim graph

artifact_hash.description: canonical_sha256 of the referenced artifact per CANONICALIZATION_V1

witness_role.description: Class of witness: MAYOR (adjudicator) or SENATE_MEMBER (designated human). Machine-only roles are not valid.

senate_id.description: Required iff witness_role=SENATE_MEMBER; identifies which senate member is witnessing. Null or omitted iff witness_role=MAYOR.

witness_identity.description: Specific identifier of the human witness

verdict.description: AUTHORIZED: approves declared scope. REJECTED: denies export. DEFERRED: more information required.

scope_of_reference.description: Narrow, specific declaration of what external use is authorized. General authorizations are invalid.

export_permission.description: Machine-readable authorization flag. Must be true iff verdict=AUTHORIZED.

related_policy_id.description: Binds this receipt to its governing policy

notes.description: Optional human-readable narrative. Does not grant permissions beyond verdict+scope_of_reference.

witness_timestamp_basis.description: Deterministic timing anchor (ledger entry, block height, or null). Wall-clock is not authoritative.
